allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); df = pd.read_excel\('book_list-名著.xlsx'\); print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)\); print\('Shape:', df.shape\); print\('\\nFirst 3 rows:'\); for i, row in df.head\(3\).iterrows\(\): print\(f'Row {i}:', dict\(row\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel\('book_list-名著.xlsx'\); import json; print\(json.dumps\({'columns': list\(df.columns\), 'shape': df.shape, 'sample': df.head\(1\).to_dict\('records'\)[0]}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel\('data/processed/books_001.xlsx'\); print\('列名:', list\(df.columns\)\); print\('行数:', len\(df\)\); print\('\\n前 2 行:'\); print\(df.head\(2\).to_string\(\)\)")
